heading: Regulations
label: 5903 Regulations
text: The Office of Personnel Management may prescribe such regulations as it considers necessary for the administration of this subchapter.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesSection of title 5Source (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)59035: 5901(d).[None.]The regulatory authority contained in , the source statute for which was , , applies also to section 405 of that act (added by , , ). Section 405 is codified as by this bill.5 U.S.C. 5901(d)section 404 of the act of September 1, 1954, ch. 120868 Stat. 1115section 407 of the act of July 18, 1966Public Law 89–50480 Stat. 2995 U.S.C. 5902

Amendments1990— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “The President shall prescribe regulations necessary for the uniform administration of this subchapter.”Pub. L. 101–5091979— substituted “President” for “Director of the Bureau of the Budget”.Pub. L. 96–54

Effective Date of 1990 AmendmentAmendment by effective on such date as the President shall determine, but not earlier than 90 days, and not later than 180 days, after , see section 529 [title III, § 305] of , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 101–509Pub. L. 101–509section 5301 of this titleNov. 5, 1990
Effective Date of 1979 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 96–54section 2(b) of Pub. L. 96–54section 305 of this titleJuly 12, 1979
